results.name: build_adl_candidate_set
results.rationale: whole-fn-override:budget-exhausted; param `this` preserved verbatim per validator's prototype rule and rebound to HLIL `exchange`; replaced for-in iterators with HLIL-named indexed while loops (i, j, entry_count, positions_count) to remove implicit `iter` locals; idiomatic iter→lookup→insert→compute_adl_requirement loop modeling the binary's per-entry candidate set construction.

results.name: compute_margin_requirement_by_mode
results.rationale: Validates oracle px against position.kind, dispatches on margin-mode byte (custom-table/liq/ADL) for the divisor, then packs two distinct output layouts depending on disc==3 vs not.

regions.note: Oracle px validation: notional = oracle.price * position.coin_idx, validate the (source,timestamp) 16-byte chunk against position.kind, pick px_tag = 2 if notional was zero else the validated tag.

results.name: compute_user_margin_and_shortfall
results.transport_error:
sdk: Exception: Command failed with exit code 1 (exit code: 1)
Error output: Check stderr output for details
results.rationale: whole-fn-override: budget exhausted; seed total_equity+iso_equity from account_equity, iterate positions via btree_cursor calling compute_margin_requirement_by_mode, accumulate four Option UnitQty via option_unit_qty_add_a/b. `this`/`mkt` are signer-mandated param names.

results.name: compute_adl_ranking_score
results.rationale: whole-fn-override:final-attempt. ADL ranking score = clamp(account_value/abs_notional, 1e-8) * clamp(max(pnl, 0)/entry_notional, 1e-8); cross/isolated margin branch via rbx_1==3, long/short PnL via is_long.

results.name: clearinghouse_adl_orchestrator
results.rationale: whole-fn-override: param names mapped to HLIL slot names (asset_meta→adl_fill_ctx, market→r12, candidates→adl_candidates, deferred_only→arg6) to satisfy unbound-locals check; signature types unchanged. Body: init iterators, walk candidates, compute shortfall, fill counterparties, aggregate by AdlResult into BTreeMap.

results.name: compute_position_liquidation_check
results.rationale: Liquidation-check dispatch: idx==0 fast path via clearinghouse-wide state; valid oracle entries flow through per-asset price lookup + per-position liq margin, capped at MAX_MARGIN, with HYPE/ZXQJ floor min-cap branch.
